session.title: Sessions
session.label: Label
session.forceRemoteHint: Override local-address detection when this session reaches a remote daemon through localhost (for example an SSH tunnel).

queue.title: Queues
queue.name: Name
queue.deleteConfirm: Remove this queue? Downloads will be detached.
queue.manageHint: Create, start, stop, or remove download queues.
queue.deleteConfirmBatch: Remove {{count}} queue(s)? Downloads will be detached.

download.title: Downloads
download.filenameHint: Leave empty to use the name from the URL
download.outputPathHint: Leave empty to use the default download folder
download.selectHint: Select a download to view details
download.deleteFiles: Also delete downloaded files from disk
download.redownloadConfirm: Remove the completed file for "{{name}}" and download it again?
download.redownloadConfirmBatch: Remove {{count}} completed file(s) and download them again?
download.resumeUnsupportedMessage: The server for "{{name}}" does not support resuming a partial download. Restart this download from the beginning, or create a new download entry.
download.refreshLinkWaiting: Waiting for a new download link for "{{name}}". Grab a link from the browser extension, then Avar will validate it.
download.refreshLinkStartFailed: Could not start link refresh mode
download.refreshLinkApplyFailed: Could not apply the captured link
download.refererMismatchMessage: The captured link comes from a different site than the original referer. Use this link anyway?
download.sizeMismatchMessage: The server now reports a different size for "{{name}}" (saved {{persisted}}, remote {{probed}}). Resuming with the partial file may corrupt it.
download.copyToLocalNeedsPath: Set a local download folder in Settings → General

checksum.hint: Compute a checksum for the downloaded file on the daemon and compare it with a published value.
checksum.expectedHint: Paste the reference hash from a release page or checksum file.
checksum.error: Could not compute checksum for this file.
checksum.disconnected: Connect to the daemon to validate checksums.

batchAdd.title: Add downloads
batchAdd.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, URL, or type…
batchAdd.selectionHint: Shift+click a row for range select. Ctrl+click (Cmd on macOS) toggles items.
batchAdd.queueStartFailed: Downloads were queued but the queue could not be started

settings.title: Settings
settings.footerMonitorsHint: Choose which system metrics appear in the footer when connected to the daemon.

remoteCopy.title: Remote downloads
remoteCopy.hint: When connected to a remote daemon, completed files can be copied to this folder on your computer.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.hint: Show desktop notifications when downloads change status, queues start or stop, or the daemon connection is lost.

desktop.title: Desktop
desktop.hint: Options for the Avar desktop app (Electron).
desktop.keepInTrayOnClose: Keep in system tray when closing the window

pwa.title: Install web app
pwa.hint: Install Avar as a standalone app in your browser. Notifications require permission.
pwa.installed: Avar is installed on this device.
pwa.installUnavailable: Install is available when your browser offers it (usually after visiting over HTTPS or localhost).
pwa.notificationsHint: Allow notifications for download status changes and connection alerts.
pwa.notificationsDenied: Notifications were blocked. Enable them in browser settings.
pwa.notificationsUnsupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
pwa.updateAvailable: A new version of Avar is available.

browser.title: Browser integration
browser.hint: Install the Avar extension to send media links from any web page through the Avar front-end.
browser.extensionConnected: Extension can reach the Avar front-end
browser.extensionDisconnected: Extension cannot reach the Avar front-end
browser.suspendHint: Temporarily stop accepting extension requests without changing your listen preference. Use this if the extension causes problems.
browser.suspendedHint: Extension integration is suspended. Resume when you are ready to accept extension requests again.
browser.guiUrl: Avar bridge URL (paste into the extension popup):
browser.daemonOffline: Connect to the daemon first so downloads can be queued from the extension.
browser.installStarted: Download started for {{browser}}. Follow the steps below to finish installation.
browser.stepDownload: Download the extension package for your browser.
browser.stepExtract: Extract the ZIP archive to a folder on your computer.
browser.stepLoad: Open your browser extensions page, enable Developer mode, and choose Load unpacked (Chromium) or Load Temporary Add-on (Firefox).
browser.stepConfigure: Select the extracted folder. The extension auto-detects the Electron bridge; paste the bridge URL if needed.

queues.hint: Manage download queues connected to the daemon.
queues.maxConnectionsHint: Per-queue limits are edited on each queue.
queues.editHint: Use the queue manager to set max connections, paths, and other per-queue options.

daemon.autoShutdownWhenIdle: When idle (no active downloads or connected clients)
daemon.remoteFileDownloadHint: Allow the GUI to fetch completed files from this daemon over HTTP (for copy to local folder on remote sessions). Disabled by default.
daemon.fileDownloadEnabled: Allow HTTP download of completed files
daemon.fsBrowseHint: Allow the GUI to browse directories on this daemon when configuring paths on remote sessions. Disabled by default.

about.intro: Avar is a cross-platform download manager — fast, open, and built to stay out of your way. Thank you for being here. 💙
about.backendDisconnected: Connect to a session to see the daemon version
about.authorText: Created and maintained by Ali Kherad — crafting reliable download tooling in pure C and modern web tech.
about.licenseText: Avar is open source. You are free to use, study, modify, and share it under the project license.
about.sponsorsText: Want to see Avar move faster? Become a sponsor and help fund development, testing, and cross-platform polish — your logo could shine right here. ✨
about.donateText: Enjoying Avar? A small contribution — even the price of a coffee — keeps downloads flowing and features landing. Every bit of support means the world. ☕
about.reportBugText: Found something broken or confusing? Open an issue on GitHub and we'll take a look.

shortcuts.hint: Click a shortcut button, then press the new key combination. Press Escape to cancel.

extensionPanel.title: Extension integration
extensionPanel.suspendHint: Temporarily reject extension requests until you resume. Your listen preference is unchanged.
extensionPanel.suspendedHint: Extension requests are rejected until you resume.
extensionPanel.updateAvailable: A newer extension version is available. Reinstall from Settings → Browser integration.

directoryPath.remoteDisconnected: Connect to the daemon to browse folders.

common.staleData: Showing last known data — not connected to the daemon
